notes: Top deck (140 mm flat-to-flat hex). Carries battery + electronics + optional arm; smaller than bottom so the legs sweep clear.
Bottom structural plate (200 mm flat-to-flat hex). Takes the six coxa-bracket M3 bolts and per-leg yaw-servo body cutouts.
Open-top LiPo tray; velcro slots through the long walls.
Mounts Arduino + 2x PCA9685; standoffs are part of the geometry.
Holds the yaw servo. Cradle pocket prints opening +Z.
Yaw-driven arm; oriented so the hip-pitch cradle opens +Z.
Thigh; printed with the spar's broad face on the bed and the knee cradle sticking up (opens -Z) -- minimizes FDM supports.
Shin link, ends in foot socket. Lay flat for FDM.
*** SEPARATE QUOTE *** -- needs flexible TPU for grip. If TPU isn't available, FDM PLA works but the foot will slip.
Tiny part -- consider FDM PLA at home if you have a printer.
